title: The More Mighty, The More Merciful.
content:
Who may do most, does least: the bravest will
    Show mercy there, where they have power to kill.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The More Mighty, The More Merciful.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
